prompt: Luxury fashion house style logo on pure black background. A perfectly crafted monogram where two capital letter M's are stacked and interlocked like a high-end fashion brand emblem — think Chanel CC or Louis Vuitton LV but with two M letters. The monogram is rendered in pure white with extremely thin elegant lines, almost like an engraving. Below the monogram symbol, the text 'MM AGENCY' appears in ultra-thin uppercase serif typography with very wide letter spacing. The entire design screams luxury, exclusivity, and sophistication. Minimal, elegant, timeless. Vector sharp quality on solid black canvas. No decorations, no effects — pure clean form.
